errors.message: "user" is a reserved base type and cannot be redefined
permission must be granted by >= 1 role
parent type "folder" (via "parent") has no permission "read"; "can_read from parent" would be invalid in OpenFGA
duplicate parent relation: "parent" (merge into one ParentRef)
role "owner" must be assignable by >= 1 subject
group member list must be non-empty
